# Vishesh Jha - Full Stack Developer
> Building Products That Matter

Vishesh Jha is a Full Stack Developer building scalable, AI-powered products.

## Projects
- Saarthi: AI-powered academic operating system.
- PrepX: Intelligent examination platform.
- PULSE: Smart wearable ecosystem for emergency detection.
- Veronica: Autonomous AI assistant.
